name: Shanghai Bailian (Group) Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Bailian (Group) Co., Ltd. owns and operates department stores, shopping malls, outlets, large stores, supermarkets, and convenience stores. It is also involved in the fields of e-commerce, logistics, consumer services, commercial investment, real estate, asset management, and electronic information, as well as trades in non-ferrous and ferrous metals, automotive, light chemical, electrical, timber, fuel, etc. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China. Shanghai Bailian (Group) Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Bailian (Group) Co., Ltd.
